text: A healthy lifestyle is about more than just eating your vegetables. A balanced diet, with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, even a 30-minute walk each day, keeps your heart strong and improves your mood. Sleep is equally important. Most adults need about seven to nine hours of quality sleep each night to allow their bodies and minds to rest and recover. Finally, don't forget your mental health. Managing stress and maintaining a good work-life balance are key. Make time for hobbies and relaxation. By looking after both your body and your mind, you can feel healthier and happier every day.
